description_long: This object is a realistic representation of a crab, featuring a broad, slightly domed carapace with a sandy beige coloration. The crab has two prominent, asymmetrical claws (chelae) at the front, with one claw appearing slightly larger than the other. Its body is supported by eight segmented walking legs, each jointed and tapering to a point, giving the crab a spindly, agile appearance. The underside of the crab is visible in some views, showing the detailed segmentation and subtle texturing typical of crustacean exoskeletons. The surface of the crab is matte and slightly rough, with naturalistic color variations and subtle shading. No antennae or eyes are distinctly visible in these images, focusing attention on the claws and legs.
description: A sandy beige crab with two large claws and eight jointed legs, featuring a matte, slightly rough exoskeleton and naturalistic detailing.
description_view_0: The crab is seen from below, highlighting the underside of the carapace, the bases of the claws, and the segmentation of the legs.
description_view_1: A three-quarter rear view shows the curvature of the carapace, the articulation of the legs, and the size difference between the claws.
description_view_2: A direct top-down view displays the full width of the carapace, both claws, and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs.
description_view_3: A three-quarter front view from the opposite side, emphasizing the length of the legs and the robust structure of the claws.
